judge_result.short_rationale: The answer correctly tells the worker to remove contaminated clothing and rinse with water, but it misses the required immediate action to call a doctor or poison control center right away for any skin exposure. Instead it delays escalation to only if irritation persists. It also adds unsupported instructions about soap, scrubbing, and neutralizing agents that are not in the source.
